description: Fixtures for user-visible workflow handoff questions. These cases prevent markdown-only handoffs and truncated UI choice labels.

question.title: Approve plan scope
question.prompt: Step 1/1: approve the plan scope before writing the durable implementation plan?
question.reason: The answer determines whether planning can become a durable artifact or must be revised first.

choices.label: Continue plan
choices.description: Writes the durable plan from the approved scope and keeps review gates active.

choices.label: Revise scope
choices.description: Returns to intake so missing or excessive scope can be corrected before a plan exists.

question.title: Review implementation plan
question.prompt: Step 1/1: send the implementation plan through the required specialist review loop?
question.reason: The answer decides whether the plan can be reviewed, revised, or stopped before atomization.

choices.label: Continue review
choices.description: Runs the required review loop and binds the result to runtime receipts.

choices.label: Inspect readiness
choices.description: Shows blockers, receipts, and verification evidence without mutating workflow state.

question.title: Atomize reviewed plan
question.prompt: Step 1/1: atomize the reviewed plan into an epic and child work items?
question.reason: The answer decides whether a passed review becomes durable work items or stays as a reviewed plan.

choices.label: Continue atomization
choices.description: Creates the epic and child tasks from the reviewed plan without starting execution.

choices.label: Revise plan first
choices.description: Returns to the reviewed plan so findings can be folded in before task creation.

question.title: Start scoped execution
question.prompt: Step 1/1: start executing the approved work graph with scoped task verification?
question.reason: The answer authorizes targeted task execution while keeping the full test suite for the final gate.

choices.label: Start execution
choices.description: Runs ready work items with scoped verification only for each task or epic.

choices.label: Keep stopped
choices.description: Preserves the approved work graph without starting worker tasks.

question.title: Inspect workflow readiness
question.prompt: Step 1/1: show blockers, receipts, and verification evidence without mutation?
question.reason: The answer provides a safe diagnostic path when the user needs clarity before continuing.

choices.label: Show readiness
choices.description: Prints current blockers, receipts, graph status, and verification evidence only.

choices.label: Return to handoff
choices.description: Keeps the active question open so the user can choose the next workflow action.
